text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Another year has passed, and with it, more races and racers have
made their way into racing history.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
In addition to her award, this Umamusume has also received a special
set of racewear to commemorate this occasion.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Now then, we shall move on to the main event. Welcome to the URA
Awards Ceremony.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Okay, time to get dullsville here to make some noise...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Don't even think about it! This is not the time or place!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, but I understand the desire to celebrate.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
If we were at the racecourse, we'd be drowned out by the crowd's
cheers.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Mhm! "Waaah! I'm so happy for youuu!" I can totally see the stands
bursting into tears and cheers!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Spe's received plenty of cheers like that already.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Spe's received plenty of cheers like that already.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It's so strange to think about.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
When I first met her, she was a helpless Umamusume who had lost her
way to the school after just arriving from Hokkaido...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In the blink of an eye, she's grown into a fine racer. But a lot certainly
happened in that time.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
And now we'll introduce our awardee. For her achievements and
contributions to the racing world, we present this award to...

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: Team Sirius's own Special Week!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I-I am S-S-S-Special Week!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: Congratulations on your award. Could we ask for a few words?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: S-sure! I am truly honored to have received such a prestigious award!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Look at her shake in her boots...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale... Um... I also want to say...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Getting where I am today involved a lot of people and experience,
each one just as important as the last.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
This all started with a dream I inherited from my moms, and along the
way, I've run with many friends—my racing rivals.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Of course, it wasn't always an easy journey. At times, the hills felt
extra steep and the road extra muddy. I could have slipped at any
moment.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But whenever I faltered, my trainer was there to offer their support.
They showed me the path I needed to take.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Together we took on each obstacle one at a time, and before I knew
it, I was the racer I am today.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I may not be able to meet all your expectations, but...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I want to be a racer that brings you hope—one that can show you that your wildest dreams can come true!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: My heart is pounding, but I can't tell if it's from nerves or excitement.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I feel the same way. We're finally running together, after all!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
This is our long-awaited showdown... Let us give it our all, and leave
no regrets.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Yeah! We'll give our all—no holding back!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: As the best in Japan, I run carrying the dreams of many!
